title: Trias bractescens
taxonomy: Trias bractescens is classified within the plant family Celastraceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaves and flowers, which are typical of the Celastraceae family. The Celastraceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine or bittersweet family. Trias bractescens is a member of the genus Trias, which is part of the larger family Celastraceae. The classification of Trias bractescens reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the Celastraceae family.
benefits: Trias bractescens has been reported to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. parts: Trias bractescens, being a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
